assets-flags--docs.name: Docs
assets-flags--docs.title: Assets/Flags
assets-flags--docs.content:
import { Meta } from '@storybook/addon-docs/blocks'; # Flags 271 SVG country flags in two aspect ratios, named by ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code. export const Flag = ({ code, name }) => (
{code.toUpperCase()}
{name}
); ## Nordic
## Europe
## Americas
## Asia & Pacific
--- ### Formats | Aspect | Path | Use case | |--------|------|----------| | 4:3 | `/flags/4x3/{code}.svg` | Standard flag | | 1:1 | `/flags/1x1/{code}.svg` | Icons, avatars | ### Usage ```html ```

introduction--docs.name: Docs
introduction--docs.title: Introduction
introduction--docs.content: import { Meta } from '@storybook/addon-docs/blocks'; # Atlas Design System The shared design system for **Ticker Tape News** and **The Desk**. Atlas centralizes components, design tokens, and assets so both projects stay visually consistent. --- ### What's inside | Section | Description | |---------|-------------| | **Colors** | Brand palette and surface colors | | **Typography** | Figtree font family and scale | | **Flags** | 271 SVG country flags in 4:3 and 1:1 | --- ### Quick start Install Figtree and reference Atlas tokens: ```html ``` Flag usage: ```html ```

tokens-typography--docs.name: Docs
tokens-typography--docs.title: Tokens/Typography
tokens-typography--docs.content:
import { Meta } from '@storybook/addon-docs/blocks'; # Typography Atlas uses **Figtree** — a variable Google Font supporting weights 300–900 with italic. export const Sample = ({ weight, size, label }) => (
{label} The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
); ## Weights ## Scale export const ScaleSample = ({ size, label }) => (
{label} Ticker Tape News
); --- ### Load font ```html ``` ```css body { font-family: 'Figtree', sans-serif; } ```
